description_long: This is a large, vintage-style metal kettle with a bulbous cylindrical body and a distinctive spherical, riveted lid. The kettle features two arched side handles and a prominent spout protruding from the lower portion of the body. The lid is dome-shaped with visible rivets and a central rod or pipe extending vertically from its top, suggesting it may be used for industrial or large-scale boiling purposes. The surface is a weathered, oxidized copper or bronze color, with visible seams and patina indicating age and heavy use. The overall construction appears robust, with utilitarian design elements and minimal decorative features.
description: A large, weathered metal kettle with a riveted domed lid, side handles, and a protruding spout, finished in an oxidized copper tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout facing forward, both arched handles visible, and the domed, riveted lid with a central rod.
description_view_1: Side view with the spout extending to the left, one handle and the domed lid with rivets and central rod visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with both handles visible, no spout in sight, and the domed lid with central rod prominent.
description_view_3: Side view with the spout extending to the right, one handle and the domed, riveted lid with central rod visible.
attribute_lid_design: spherical riveted removable lid with central rod
